name: The Kaplan Group
description_short: The Kaplan Group is a debt relief provider based in Santa Clara, California. Rated 4.7/5 with 12 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
The Kaplan Group is a debt relief provider serving clients in Santa Clara, California. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 12 reviews, The Kaplan Group has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Santa Clara area looking to manage and reduce their outstanding debts.

The Kaplan Group specializes in debt relief services designed to help consumers manage and reduce their outstanding debts. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Debt relief services in Santa Clara can range from debt management plans to settlement negotiations. The Kaplan Group should be evaluated based on their fee structure, success rate, and how their program may affect your credit score. Legitimate debt relief providers are typically registered with the state, and consumers should verify credentials and check for complaints with the CFPB and state attorney general before enrolling in any program.

Consumers in the Santa Clara, California area who are considering The Kaplan Group should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any debt relief provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
